<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
	<title></title>
	<script>
		function init() {
			var szLanguage = $.cookie('language');
			if(szLanguage == null) {  //å¦æç´æ¥å°ç»å½çé¢ï¼ä¹è·åä¸ä¸è¯­è¨
				if (navigator.appName == "Netscape" || navigator.appName == "Opera") {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.language.toLowerCase();
				} else {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.browserLanguage.toLowerCase();
				}
				var szLanguage = sysLanguage.substring(0,2);
				$.cookie('language', szLanguage);
			}
			var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
			if(szUrl.indexOf("&page=")!=-1) {
				if(szUrl.indexOf("user=")!=-1 && szUrl.indexOf("&pass=")!=-1) {
					var szUser = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("user=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&pass="));
					var szPass = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("pass=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&page="));
					g_oCommon.changAuthInfo(Base64.encode(szUser + ":" + szPass));
					$.ajax({
						type: "GET",
						url: g_oCommon.m_lHttp + g_oCommon.m_szHostName + ":" + g_oCommon.m_lHttpPort + "/ISAPI/Security/userCheck",
						async: true,
						timeout: 15000,
						username: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[0],
                        password: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[1],
						success: function(xmlDoc, textStatus, xhr)  {
							var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
							var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
							if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
								szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
							}
							var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
							if("200" == $(xmlDoc).find('statusValue').eq(0).text()) {
								$.cookie('page',szPage+"?"+szParam+"%1");
								g_oWebSession.setItem("userInfo", g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue);
								window.location.href = "doc/page/main.asp";
							} else {   
								window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
							}
						},
						error: function(xhr, textStatus, errorThrown) {}
					});
				} else {
					var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
					var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
					if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
						szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
					}
					var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
					window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
				}
			} else {
				window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp";
			}
		}
	</script>
</head>
<body>
	<script type="text/javascript" src="doc/script/LAB.min.js"></script>
	<script>
		$LAB
		.script("doc/script/global_config.js?version=" + new Date()).wait(function () {
			$LAB
			.script("doc/script/jquery-1.7.1.min.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/jquery.cookie.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/common.js?version=" + global_config.web_version).wait().wait(function () {
				init();
			});
		});
	</script>
</body>
</html>

<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
	<title></title>
	<script>
		function init() {
			var szLanguage = $.cookie('language');
			if(szLanguage == null) {  //å¦æç´æ¥å°ç»å½çé¢ï¼ä¹è·åä¸ä¸è¯­è¨
				if (navigator.appName == "Netscape" || navigator.appName == "Opera") {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.language.toLowerCase();
				} else {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.browserLanguage.toLowerCase();
				}
				var szLanguage = sysLanguage.substring(0,2);
				$.cookie('language', szLanguage);
			}
			var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
			if(szUrl.indexOf("&page=")!=-1) {
				if(szUrl.indexOf("user=")!=-1 && szUrl.indexOf("&pass=")!=-1) {
					var szUser = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("user=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&pass="));
					var szPass = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("pass=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&page="));
					g_oCommon.changAuthInfo(Base64.encode(szUser + ":" + szPass));
					$.ajax({
						type: "GET",
						url: g_oCommon.m_lHttp + g_oCommon.m_szHostName + ":" + g_oCommon.m_lHttpPort + "/ISAPI/Security/userCheck",
						async: true,
						timeout: 15000,
						username: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[0],
                        password: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[1],
						success: function(xmlDoc, textStatus, xhr)  {
							var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
							var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
							if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
								szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
							}
							var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
							if("200" == $(xmlDoc).find('statusValue').eq(0).text()) {
								$.cookie('page',szPage+"?"+szParam+"%1");
								g_oWebSession.setItem("userInfo", g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue);
								window.location.href = "doc/page/main.asp";
							} else {   
								window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
							}
						},
						error: function(xhr, textStatus, errorThrown) {}
					});
				} else {
					var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
					var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
					if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
						szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
					}
					var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
					window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
				}
			} else {
				window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp";
			}
		}
	</script>
</head>
<body>
	<script type="text/javascript" src="doc/script/LAB.min.js"></script>
	<script>
		$LAB
		.script("doc/script/global_config.js?version=" + new Date()).wait(function () {
			$LAB
			.script("doc/script/jquery-1.7.1.min.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/jquery.cookie.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/common.js?version=" + global_config.web_version).wait().wait(function () {
				init();
			});
		});
	</script>
</body>
</html>

<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
	<title></title>
	<script>
		function init() {
			var szLanguage = $.cookie('language');
			if(szLanguage == null) {  //å¦æç´æ¥å°ç»å½çé¢ï¼ä¹è·åä¸ä¸è¯­è¨
				if (navigator.appName == "Netscape" || navigator.appName == "Opera") {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.language.toLowerCase();
				} else {
					var sysLanguage= navigator.browserLanguage.toLowerCase();
				}
				var szLanguage = sysLanguage.substring(0,2);
				$.cookie('language', szLanguage);
			}
			var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
			if(szUrl.indexOf("&page=")!=-1) {
				if(szUrl.indexOf("user=")!=-1 && szUrl.indexOf("&pass=")!=-1) {
					var szUser = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("user=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&pass="));
					var szPass = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("pass=") + 5, szUrl.indexOf("&page="));
					g_oCommon.changAuthInfo(Base64.encode(szUser + ":" + szPass));
					$.ajax({
						type: "GET",
						url: g_oCommon.m_lHttp + g_oCommon.m_szHostName + ":" + g_oCommon.m_lHttpPort + "/ISAPI/Security/userCheck",
						async: true,
						timeout: 15000,
						username: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[0],
                        password: g_oWebSession.getUNamePWD(g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue)[1],
						success: function(xmlDoc, textStatus, xhr)  {
							var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
							var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
							if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
								szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
							}
							var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
							if("200" == $(xmlDoc).find('statusValue').eq(0).text()) {
								$.cookie('page',szPage+"?"+szParam+"%1");
								g_oWebSession.setItem("userInfo", g_oCommon.m_szUserPwdValue);
								window.location.href = "doc/page/main.asp";
							} else {   
								window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
							}
						},
						error: function(xhr, textStatus, errorThrown) {}
					});
				} else {
					var szUrl = decodeURI(document.URL);
					var szPage = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("&page=") + 6, szUrl.indexOf("[&"));
					if(szPage.indexOf(".asp") == -1) {
						szPage = szPage.concat(".asp");
					}
					var szParam = szUrl.substring(szUrl.indexOf("[&") + 2, szUrl.length - 1);
					window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp"+"?page="+szPage+"&params="+szParam;
				}
			} else {
				window.location.href = "doc/page/login.asp";
			}
		}
	</script>
</head>
<body>
	<script type="text/javascript" src="doc/script/LAB.min.js"></script>
	<script>
		$LAB
		.script("doc/script/global_config.js?version=" + new Date()).wait(function () {
			$LAB
			.script("doc/script/jquery-1.7.1.min.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/jquery.cookie.js").wait()
			.script("doc/script/common.js?version=" + global_config.web_version).wait().wait(function () {
				init();
			});
		});
	</script>
</body>
</html>
